name: rom
description: ROM - social feed + workspaces with role-based access and an app builder, on Firebase.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:module && npm run build:app
scripts.deploy: npm run build:all && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:app && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run build:app && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
